title: Capacitive touchscreen Gloves
description: Line your gloves so that you can answer your phone with them on!  These gloves allow you to answer your phone or use your tablet with them on! The conductive ink is available from our webshop at https://secure.workingink.co.uk/working-ink-shop/ along with many other materials for experimentation and craft, like the felt shown in the heaters I made for gloves and pockets at https://youtu.be/3nw07mzGIWU.   You can also donate to further Rob's work on the all-carbon battery.
